title: Workspaces Default Board
excerpt: I would like to alter the link for the Workspaces icon that appears top left. Each time I click it it takes me to a seemingly random board in my main workspace where I’d like it always to default to the first board liste…

posts.author: GClarke (Gareth Clarke)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to alter the link for the Workspaces icon that appears top left. Each time I click it it takes me to a seemingly random board in my main workspace where I’d like it always to default to the first board listed.

Many thanks
